title: 📐 Intentionality Geometry
name: Intentionality Geometry
what_it_is: Geometries shaped entirely by will—structures that respond to intent alone, forming or distorting in response to unspoken desire.
how_to_use: his thoughts realign the temple—geometry folds into longing
she breathes calm and the walls stabilize—the triangle accepts peace
animation_behavior: Structures ripple with emotion, sharp angles soften with intent, space reshapes on presence alone ---
